title: Longest Common Subsequence
output_format: The length of their longest common subsequence. Return `0` if there is no common subsequence.
constraints:
- `1 <= text1.length, text2.length <= 1000`
- `text1` and `text2` consist of only lowercase English characters.
function_signature: function longestCommonSubsequence(text1: string, text2: string): number {}
